summary: Most theme refresh requirements appear implemented: global light navy/green gradient utility applied to AppShell/AuthGate/Login, updated CSS color tokens to navy/green, branded loading/redirect states to avoid blank UI, and a glowing CTA button style with prefers-reduced-motion handling. One notable gap is remaining purple-heavy accents in MakerLandingPage feature gradients. Also, an extra decorative grid background was added on the Login page, which was not explicitly requested and may conflict with the “no new large decorative images” intent (though it is subtle).

missing_requirements.requirement: De-emphasize purple in favor of a light navy + green palette and apply consistently to UI accents across modules.
missing_requirements.reason: MakerLandingPage feature accents still use pink/purple and orange/red gradients, which keeps purple-dominant styling in key UI accents instead of navy/green.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a decorative grid image overlay background to the Login page.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not ask for adding new decorative imagery/background overlays; REQ-17 discourages adding new large decorative images without explicit placement instructions (this is subtle, but it is an added decorative background element).
